title: EndpointType Deserialize inlines from_uri call; others inline match directly
description: crates/jmap-chat/src/types.rs line 198 — EndpointType::deserialize delegates to EndpointType::from_uri(&s), while every other enum (ChatMemberRole L411-415, ChatKind L581-586, BodyType L636-641, OwnerPresence L1089-1095, PushUrgency L1288-1294) inlines the match directly in the deserialize body. This is a minor structural divergence. Not wrong, but it means EndpointType is the odd one out both in naming (from_uri) and in impl structure. The from_uri method is also tested directly (test_endpoint_type_from_uri), so it earns its keep — but the asymmetry should be noted and resolved either by adding from_str helpers to the others or by inlining EndpointType similarly.
